titleStmt.title: SII 27.422: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 422. (A.R. No. 563 of 1929-30.) HATYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the prākāra of the Lōkanāthēśvara temple.

This record engraved below No. 423, confirms a gift of land to the god Lōkanāthadēva made by the two brothers Duggaṇa-Koṅga and Timmappa Koṅga and by Baṁkiyarasa alias Hoṅnaya-Kaṁbaḷi-voḍeya alias Ammidēvi-amma. The two donors had inherited the gift land from their grand-mother Sūramma-seṭṭi. The latter had received the same in the year Plavaṅga as kanyādāna from her grand-father Hiriya-Hoṁneya-Kaṁbaḷi-voḍeya alias Baṁki-arasa who, for that purpose, purchased the land from Yisara-aḍah, son of Kōṭīsara-aḍaha for 300 varāha-gadyāṇas.
It is dated Śaka 1498, Yuva, Vaiśākha-amāvāsye, Tuesday corresponding to 1575 A.D., May 10. The Śaka year was current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1498 neya yuvasaṁvatsarada vaiśākha bahuḷa Amāvāseya maṁgaḷavāradalu śrīmatu baṁkiyarasa hoṁneya
kaṁbaḷi vaḍeyarāda Aṁmidēva Aṁmanavaru haṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvarige voḍavaṁṭu koṭṭa dharmaśāsanada paṭṭivakkaṇeya kramaveṁteṁdare hiriya hoṁne
yya kaṁbaḷivaḍeyaru tāumāḍikoṁḍa bāḷapatrada vakhaṇeya vivara plavaṁga saṁvatsarada bēsage modalāgi śrīmatu baṁkiyarasarāda hoṁneya kaṁbaḷi vaḍeyaru
haṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya kōṭīsara Aḍahana maga yisara Aḍahana kayyalū māḍikoṁḍa sarvvasvada gadde vivara . cōḷaneṁba gadde mu 4 kurrubilagadde mu 1 . cikkakurru
bilaneṁba gadde mu 1 . yēkāṁtanahāḷi mu 1 . baḷḷinahāḷi mu . biḍḍaneṁbagadde mu . naragahāḷi mu 1 . haḍuvalu mu 1 . Aṁtubayalu mu 11 . mattaṁ mallagadde
mu 1 dēuseṭṭimane maṁdaṇamalligadde mu 1 . boṁmanamekki mu 3 Aṁtu mu 5 . Ubhayaṁ bayalu makkisaha gade mu 16 ... nūyibāḷigebaṁda manekaṇahaṭṭi koṭṭage
Asabhasabha baki keḷagaṇa teṁgina tōṭamuṁtāda sarvvasvakke baṁkiyarasaru honnaya kaṁbaḷi voḍeyaru kōṭēsara Aḍahana maga yisara Aḍahage koṭa varaha ga 300 Akṣaradallūyida
muṁnūrru varahananū koṭṭu voḷagaṇa mūla horragaṇa Aruvāra saha biḍāruvāravāgi biḍisikoṁḍu naṁma voṁmagaḷu hoṁnnamma seṭṭitige kaṁnyā dānavāgi �yo sarvvasvada A
rtha baṁdaru Urattibaṁdaru Ākegeyeṁdu koṭṭa patra yi patrakke Āda Ārrikeya hoṇe mukalāṭiya yisaraAḍaharu sakṣiya doregaḷu hoṁnnayyameraṭa koṭaṇa kaṁba
ḷi maṇiheggeḍeyaru yiṁtivaru bhayāṁnumatadiṁda karttanavoppa heṇekārrana voppa ciṭṭimakkiya brahmaru mūliya voppa kōṭada Ayirōḍiya braṁharu
sākṣi doregaḷa voppa . �yo sarvvasvavanū hoṁnama seṭṭiyatiyu Avara saṁtānadavaru baddu baralāgi Ā sūraṁma seṭatiya mūṁmakaḷu dugaṇa koṁganu tiṁmappa koṁganu yi kartaru vo
ppi sūryagrahaṇadali haṭṭi yaṁgaḍi lōkanātha dēvarige Amṛtapaḍige yi bayalu makki saha mu 16 . hadinārrumuḍiyu mūvattu hāne gaddeyanū dhāreya nerradu ko
ṭṭadu nāu yi sarvasvavanu voppidēvarige koṭṭeU yi sarvada Artha baṁdaru Urattibaṁdaru dēvarabhaṁḍhārakke Agumāḍikoṁḍu baddu bahadu . muṁde �yo sarvasvavanū hiridu
hoṁneya kaṁbaḷivoḍeyaru sūraṁma seṭṭitiya tāyi hoṁnamaseṭitiga koṭa sarvasvaveṁdu naṁma Aramaneyavaru kēḷuvudillāyeṁdu koṭṭa dharmasādhanada paṭṭi yidakke sākṣiga .
ḷu Āditya caṁdramassugaḷu .
Digital edition of SII 27.422 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
